data.body: WS-B3 DONE: migrate.py (read-time vN->v(N+1) chained up-conversion shim framework, never in-place; upgrade-rebar gate reuses schema_name_for_version; v1 is base so _SHIMS empty, chaining proven via synthetic-shim tests). 6 unit tests. Next: WS-B2 linter (reference integrity + expression allow-list + secret scan + post-substitution re-validation).
